CustomField.description: This is the date the PSET was no longer found in the native tables. It is then deactivated by nightly L.FLOW. (We keep the data in case we need to reconstruct)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This is the date the PSET was no longer found in the native tables. It is then deactivated by nightly L.FLOW. (We keep the data in case we need to reconstruct)
CustomField.label: Deactivation Date
